caption: A man and a woman are recording a podcast in a studio setting with a yellow wall accent. The man wears a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt, a watch, and a bracelet, speaking while gesturing with his hand. The woman has her hair in high dreadlocks and wears a black t-shirt and headphones. Both are seated behind professional microphones. In the background, a monitor displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a sign reads "Employee Only." The screen features logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101 by 11 Logo Studio." As the sequence progresses, the camera cuts from a wide shot of the man to a medium shot of the woman. She remains in the frame, listening and smiling slightly as she looks toward the man, who is no longer visible in the final two shots.
